questions.question: She ____ a book for two hours before her mother came.
questions.explanation: অতীতে একটি কাজ দীর্ঘ সময় ধরে চলছিল এবং অতীতেই অন্য একটি কাজের আগে শেষ হয়েছিল বোঝাতে Past Perfect Continuous হয়। 'She' এর পর 'had been' + verb-ing বসে।

questions.question: They ____ football since morning when the storm broke.
questions.explanation: ঝড় শুরু হওয়ার পূর্ব পর্যন্ত তারা সকাল থেকে খেলছিল। দীর্ঘ চলমান অতীত কাজের ক্ষেত্রে Past Perfect Continuous 'had been playing' সঠিক।

questions.question: I ____ for the exam since last night before I finally slept.
questions.explanation: ঘুমিয়ে পড়ার আগে গত রাত থেকে আমি পড়াশোনা করছিলাম। অতীতের নির্দিষ্ট সীমার আগের দীর্ঘ চলমান কাজ বোঝাতে 'had been studying' বসে।

questions.question: He ____ in this company for five years before he resigned.
questions.explanation: পদত্যাগ করার আগে সে পাঁচ বছর ধরে এই কোম্পানিতে কাজ করছিল। অতীতে নির্দিষ্ট বিন্দুর আগের চলমান অবস্থা বোঝাতে 'had been working' বসে।

questions.question: The children ____ in the rain for an hour when they caught cold.
questions.explanation: ঠান্ডা লাগার আগে শিশুরা এক ঘণ্টা ধরে বৃষ্টিতে খেলছিল। অতীতে শুরু হয়ে বেশ কিছুক্ষণ চলা কাজের জন্য Past Perfect Continuous 'had been playing' হবে।

questions.question: My mother ____ dinner all evening before the guests arrived.
questions.explanation: অতিথিরা আসার আগে মা সারা সন্ধ্যা ধরে রান্না করছিলেন। 'all evening' এবং 'before' থাকায় এখানে 'had been cooking' সঠিক।

questions.question: We ____ the movie for thirty minutes when the electricity went out.
questions.explanation: বিদ্যুৎ চলে যাওয়ার আগে আমরা ৩০ মিনিট ধরে সিনেমাটি দেখছিলাম। অতীতের ঘটনার পূর্বের ধারাবাহিক কাজ বোঝাতে 'had been watching' হবে।

questions.question: The baby ____ for an hour before the mother woke up.
questions.explanation: মা জেগে ওঠার পূর্ব পর্যন্ত শিশুটি এক ঘণ্টা ধরে কাঁদছিল। অতীতের চলমান অবস্থা বোঝাতে Past Perfect Continuous 'had been crying' বসে।

questions.question: You ____ on the phone for a long time when I knocked on the door.
questions.explanation: আমি দরজায় নক করার আগে তুমি দীর্ঘ সময় ফোনে কথা বলছিলে। অতীতের ঘটনার আগের দীর্ঘ চলমান কাজের জন্য 'had been talking' সঠিক।

questions.question: It ____ since yesterday when it finally cleared up.
questions.explanation: আকাশ পরিষ্কার হওয়ার আগে গতকাল থেকে বৃষ্টি হচ্ছিল। অতীতে নির্দিষ্ট সময়ের আগের আবহাওয়ার দীর্ঘ চলমান অবস্থা বোঝাতে 'had been raining' বসে।

questions.question: The students ____ to the lecture since 10 AM before the power failed.
questions.explanation: বিদ্যুৎ যাওয়ার আগে সকাল ১০টা থেকে ছাত্ররা লেকচার শুনছিল। অতীতের ধারাবাহিক চলমান কাজ বোঝাতে 'had been listening' বসে।

questions.question: He ____ a letter for thirty minutes before his pen broke.
questions.explanation: কলম ভেঙে যাওয়ার আগে সে ৩০ মিনিট ধরে চিঠি লিখছিল। অতীতের পূর্বের দীর্ঘ কাজ বোঝাতে 'had been writing' সঠিক।

questions.question: They ____ this bridge for two years before the fund ran out.
questions.explanation: তহবিল শেষ হওয়ার আগে তারা দুই বছর ধরে এই সেতুটি তৈরি করছিল। অতীতে নির্দিষ্ট সময়ের আগে চলমান দীর্ঘ কাজ — 'had been building'।

questions.question: I ____ for my keys all morning before I found them.
questions.explanation: চাবি পাওয়ার আগে আমি সারা সকাল ধরে খুঁজছিলাম। অতীতের দীর্ঘ ও পরিশ্রমসাধ্য চলমান কাজ বোঝাতে 'had been looking' বসে।

questions.question: She ____ a red dress for days before she changed it.
questions.explanation: বদলানোর আগে সে কয়েক দিন ধরে লাল পোশাকটি পরছিল। অতীতে দীর্ঘ সময়ের অভ্যাস বা অবস্থা বোঝাতে 'had been wearing' সঠিক।

questions.question: The birds ____ since sunrise before the storm came.
questions.explanation: ঝড় আসার আগে সূর্যোদয় থেকে পাখিগুলো ডাকছিল। অতীতে একটি কাজের আগে দীর্ঘ সময় ধরে চলা কাজ হওয়ায় 'had been singing' সঠিক।

questions.question: We ____ for the bus since 9 o'clock before we hired a cab.
questions.explanation: ট্যাক্সি ভাড়া করার আগে আমরা সকাল ৯টা থেকে বাসের জন্য অপেক্ষা করছিলাম। অপেক্ষার দীর্ঘ কাজ বোঝাতে 'had been waiting' সঠিক।

questions.question: He ____ his room all day before his friends arrived.
questions.explanation: বন্ধুরা আসার আগে সে সারা দিন ধরে তার ঘর পরিষ্কার করছিল। অতীতের দীর্ঘ চলমান কাজ বোঝাতে 'had been cleaning' বসবে।

questions.question: The dog ____ in the garden for hours before it fell asleep.
questions.explanation: ঘুমিয়ে পড়ার আগে কুকুরটি বাগানে কয়েক ঘণ্টা ধরে দৌড়াচ্ছিল। 'had been running' (double n সহ ing) সঠিক রূপ।

questions.question: I ____ dinner for our guests since afternoon before they canceled.
questions.explanation: তারা বাতিল করার আগে বিকেল থেকে আমি তাদের জন্য রাতের খাবার রান্না করছিলাম। অতীতের দীর্ঘ চলমান কাজের প্রস্তুতি — 'had been preparing'।

questions.question: She ____ to different cities for months before she ran out of money.
questions.explanation: টাকা ফুরিয়ে যাওয়ার আগে কয়েক মাস ধরে সে বিভিন্ন শহরে ভ্রমণ করছিল। অতীতের দীর্ঘ ভ্রমণ অভ্যাস — 'had been travelling'।

questions.question: They ____ a surprise party for days before it got leaked.
questions.explanation: ফাঁস হওয়ার আগে তারা বেশ কয়েক দিন ধরে সারপ্রাইজ পার্টির পরিকল্পনা করছিল। অতীতে দীর্ঘ সময় চলমান পরিকল্পনা — 'had been planning'।

questions.question: He ____ hard to improve his grades before he fell ill.
questions.explanation: অসুস্থ হওয়ার আগে সে তার গ্রেড উন্নত করতে কঠোর পরিশ্রম করছিল। অতীতে চলমান দীর্ঘ প্রচেষ্টা — 'had been working'।

questions.question: You ____ too much noise all day before the neighbor complained.
questions.explanation: প্রতিবেশীর অভিযোগের পূর্ব পর্যন্ত তুমি সারা দিন ধরে প্রচণ্ড গোলমাল করছিলে। বিরক্তি সৃষ্টিকারী অতীত ধারাবাহিক কাজ — 'had been making'।

questions.question: The company ____ new employees for months before the expansion was halted.
questions.explanation: সম্প্রসারণ বন্ধ করার আগে কোম্পানি কয়েক মাস ধরে কর্মী নিয়োগ দিচ্ছিল। অতীতের দীর্ঘমেয়াদী ধারাবাহিক কাজ — 'had been hiring'।

questions.question: I ____ progress in English since I joined this class until I left.
questions.explanation: ক্লাস ছাড়ার পূর্ব পর্যন্ত যোগদানের সময় থেকে আমি ইংরেজিতে ভালো উন্নতি করছিলাম। অতীতের দুটি সীমার মাঝে চলমান কাজ — 'had been making'।

questions.question: She ____ for her exams all week before she got tired.
questions.explanation: ক্লান্ত হওয়ার আগে সারা সপ্তাহ ধরে সে পরীক্ষার প্রস্তুতি নিচ্ছিল। অতীতে সময়ের সীমার মাঝে চলা প্রস্তুতি — 'had been preparing'।

questions.question: The world's climate ____ rapidly for decades before governments intervened.
questions.explanation: সরকার পদক্ষেপ নেওয়ার আগে কয়েক দশক ধরে জলবায়ু দ্রুত পরিবর্তিত হচ্ছিল। অতীতের দীর্ঘ ও ধারাবাহিক পরিবর্তন — 'had been changing'।

questions.question: He ____ more and more impatient as the hour passed by.
questions.explanation: সময় কেটে যাওয়ার সাথে সাথে সে ক্রমশ অধৈর্য হয়ে উঠছিল। অতীতের ধারাবাহিক মানসিক অবস্থার পরিবর্তন বোঝাতে 'had been getting' সঠিক।

questions.question: I ____ this book since last Sunday before I lost it yesterday.
questions.explanation: গতকাল হারানোর আগে গত রবিবার থেকে আমি বইটি পড়ছিলাম। অতীতের সমাপ্ত বিন্দুর পূর্ব পর্যন্ত চলমান কাজ — 'had been reading'।

questions.question: Identify the tense: 'She had been reading a book for an hour when I called.'
questions.explanation: 'had been reading' এবং 'for an hour' ও অতীত ঘটনার উল্লেখ (when I called) — এটি Past Perfect Continuous Tense-এর গঠন।

questions.question: Identify the tense: 'They had been playing football since 4 PM before the storm began.'
questions.explanation: 'had been playing' এবং 'since 4 PM' ও অতীতের ঝড় শুরুর আগের কাজের ব্যাপ্তি প্রকাশ করায় এটি Past Perfect Continuous।

questions.question: Identify the tense: 'I had been studying for my exam all morning until she visited.'
questions.explanation: তাঁর আসার পূর্ব পর্যন্ত সারা সকাল ধরে পড়াশোনা করার দীর্ঘ কাজ বোঝাতে 'had been studying' ব্যবহৃত হয়েছে — Past Perfect Continuous।

questions.question: Identify the tense: 'He had been going to the gym for months before his injury.'
questions.explanation: আঘাত পাওয়ার আগে সে কয়েক মাস ধরে নিয়মিত জিমে যাচ্ছিল। অতীতের এই দীর্ঘ অভ্যাসটি Past Perfect Continuous Tense।

questions.question: Identify the tense: 'The baby had been crying for thirty minutes before sleeping.'
questions.explanation: ঘুমিয়ে পড়ার আগে শিশুটি ৩০ মিনিট ধরে কাঁদছিল। 'had been crying' থাকায় এটি Past Perfect Continuous Tense।

questions.question: Identify the tense: 'We had been watching a movie since afternoon when the fire broke out.'
questions.explanation: আগুন লাগার আগে আমরা বিকেল থেকে সিনেমা দেখছিলাম। অতীতের ঘটনার পূর্ব পর্যন্ত চলমান দীর্ঘ কাজ — Past Perfect Continuous।

questions.question: Identify the tense: 'It had been raining outside all day before we finally went out.'
questions.explanation: অবশেষে বাইরে যাওয়ার পূর্বে সারা দিন ধরে বৃষ্টি হচ্ছিল — 'had been raining' থাকার কারণে এটি Past Perfect Continuous।

questions.question: Identify the tense: 'The students had been listening carefully until the bell rang.'
questions.explanation: ঘণ্টা বাজার পূর্ব পর্যন্ত ছাত্ররা মনোযোগ দিয়ে শুনছিল। অতীতের নির্দিষ্ট সমাপ্তিবিন্দুর আগের দীর্ঘ কাজ — Past Perfect Continuous।

questions.question: Identify the tense: 'She had been wearing that dress all day before changing.'
questions.explanation: পোশাকটি বদলানোর পূর্বে সারা দিন ধরে সে সেটি পরেছিল। 'had been wearing' ও 'all day' দ্বারা এটি Past Perfect Continuous।

questions.question: Identify the tense: 'They had been planning to travel since 2018 until the pandemic began.'
questions.explanation: মহামারী শুরুর আগে ২০১৮ সাল থেকে তারা ভ্রমণের পরিকল্পনা করছিল। অতীতের দুটি নির্দিষ্ট সীমার মাঝের দীর্ঘ কাজ — Past Perfect Continuous।

questions.question: Arrange: (for / had / she / been / reading / hours / two / before / left / she)
options: She had been reading for two hours before she left.
She reading had been for two hours before she left.
She had been for two hours reading before she left.
She left before she had been reading for two hours.
questions.correctAnswer: She had been reading for two hours before she left.
questions.explanation: সঠিক গঠন: Subject (She) + had been + verb-ing (reading) + duration (for two hours) + before + Subject (she) + V2 (left)।

questions.question: Arrange: (playing / they / had / football / since / been / morning / when / rained / it)
options: They had been playing football since morning when it rained.
They playing had been football since morning when it rained.
They had playing been football since morning when it rained.
When it rained they had been football playing since morning.
questions.correctAnswer: They had been playing football since morning when it rained.
questions.explanation: সঠিক ক্রম: Subject (They) + had been + verb-ing (playing) + Object (football) + since morning + when + it rained (V2)।

questions.question: Arrange: (waiting / I / for / had / been / the / bus / for hours / before / left / I)
options: I had been waiting for the bus for hours before I left.
I waiting had been for the bus for hours before I left.
Before I left I had waiting been for the bus for hours.
I had been for the bus waiting for hours before I left.
questions.correctAnswer: I had been waiting for the bus for hours before I left.
questions.explanation: সঠিক গঠন: Subject (I) + had been + verb-ing (waiting) + for the bus + for hours + before + I left.

questions.question: Arrange: (kitchen / had / mother / been / cooking / in / the / my / all morning / before / guests / came)
options: My mother had been cooking in the kitchen all morning before guests came.
My mother cooking had been in the kitchen all morning before guests came.
My mother had been in the kitchen cooking all morning before guests came.
Before guests came my mother had been cooking in the kitchen all morning.
questions.correctAnswer: My mother had been cooking in the kitchen all morning before guests came.
questions.explanation: সঠিক ক্রম: Subject (My mother) + had been + verb-ing (cooking) + place + duration + before + guests came.

questions.question: Arrange: (all day / they / a / planning / party / been / had / when / told / I / them)
options: They had been planning a party all day when I told them.
They planning had been a party all day when I told them.
They had planning been a party all day when I told them.
When I told them they planning had been a party all day.
questions.correctAnswer: They had been planning a party all day when I told them.
questions.explanation: সঠিক গঠন: Subject (They) + had been + verb-ing (planning) + Object + duration + when + I told them (Past Indefinite)।

questions.question: Arrange: (changing / climate / had / the / been / rapidly / for decades / before / signed / treaty / the)
options: The climate had been changing rapidly for decades before the treaty was signed.
The climate changing had been rapidly for decades before the treaty was signed.
The climate had been rapidly changing for decades before the treaty was signed.
Before the treaty was signed the climate had been changing rapidly for decades.
questions.correctAnswer: The climate had been changing rapidly for decades before the treaty was signed.
questions.explanation: সঠিক ক্রম: Subject (The climate) + had been + verb-ing (changing) + adverb + duration + before + clause (passive past simple)।

questions.question: Find the error: 'She have been reading a book for hours before she slept.'
options: She had been reading a book for hours before she slept.
She is been reading a book for hours before she slept.
She has been reading a book for hours before she slept.
She was reading a book for hours before she slept.
questions.correctAnswer: She had been reading a book for hours before she slept.
questions.explanation: অতীতে ঘুমানোর আগের দীর্ঘ কাজ বোঝাতে 'have' নয়, Past Perfect Continuous অনুযায়ী 'had' বসবে। 'She had been reading' সঠিক।

questions.question: Find the error: 'They has been playing football since morning when it rained.'
options: They had been playing football since morning when it rained.
They were been playing football since morning when it rained.
They have been playing football since morning when it rained.
They plays football since morning when it rained.
questions.correctAnswer: They had been playing football since morning when it rained.
questions.explanation: অতীতের বৃষ্টি শুরুর আগের চলমান দীর্ঘ কাজ বোঝাতে plural হলেও 'has' বা 'have' এর পরিবর্তে 'had' বসবে। 'They had been playing' সঠিক।

questions.question: Find the error: 'I is been studying for hours before you arrived.'
options: I had been studying for hours before you arrived.
I am studying for hours before you arrived.
I was studying for hours before you arrived.
I has been studying for hours before you arrived.
questions.correctAnswer: I had been studying for hours before you arrived.
questions.explanation: তোমার পৌঁছানোর আগের দীর্ঘ পড়াশোনা করার কাজ প্রকাশ করতে Past Perfect Continuous অনুযায়ী 'I had been studying' সঠিক রূপ।

questions.question: Find the error: 'He had been go to school since Monday before he fell ill.'
options: He had been going to school since Monday before he fell ill.
He is going to school since Monday before he fell ill.
He had go to school since Monday before he fell ill.
He goes to school since Monday before he fell ill.
questions.correctAnswer: He had been going to school since Monday before he fell ill.
questions.explanation: 'had been' এর পরে verb-এর সাথে 'ing' যুক্ত করা আবশ্যক। 'go' → 'going' হবে।

questions.question: Find the error: 'The children has been playing in the park for hours when it became dark.'
options: The children had been playing in the park for hours when it became dark.
The children have been playing in the park for hours when it became dark.
The children was playing in the park for hours when it became dark.
The children playing in the park for hours when it became dark.
questions.correctAnswer: The children had been playing in the park for hours when it became dark.
questions.explanation: অতীতের কোনো ঘটনার (became dark) আগের দীর্ঘস্থায়ী কাজের জন্য 'has' এর স্থলে 'had' বসবে। 'The children had been playing' সঠিক।

questions.question: Find the error: 'We is been watching a movie for hours when you knocked.'
options: We had been watching a movie for hours when you knocked.
We were watching a movie for hours when you knocked.
We have been watching a movie for hours when you knocked.
We watching a movie for hours when you knocked.
questions.correctAnswer: We had been watching a movie for hours when you knocked.
questions.explanation: 'We' এর সাথে 'is been' বলে কোনো ব্যাকরণগত রূপ নেই। অতীতের ঘটনার আগের কাজ বোঝাতে 'had been watching' হবে।

questions.question: Find the error: 'It had being raining all day before we went out.'
options: It had been raining all day before we went out.
It is raining all day before we went out.
It was raining all day before we went out.
It have been raining all day before we went out.
questions.correctAnswer: It had been raining all day before we went out.
questions.explanation: Past Perfect Continuous-এর গঠন অনুযায়ী 'had' এর পর 'being' নয়, 'been' বসে (had + been + verb-ing)।

questions.question: Find the error: 'She had been swiming for an hour when it grew cold.'
options: She had been swimming for an hour when it grew cold.
She has been swimming for an hour when it grew cold.
She is swimming for an hour when it grew cold.
She had been swim for an hour when it grew cold.
questions.correctAnswer: She had been swimming for an hour when it grew cold.
questions.explanation: বানানগত ভুল: 'swim'-এর সাথে 'ing' যুক্ত করার সময় m ডাবল হবে (swimming)। 'swiming' ভুল বানান।

questions.question: Find the error: 'He had been writeing a letter for an hour.'
options: He had been writing a letter for an hour.
He was writing a letter for an hour.
He writes a letter for an hour.
He has been writing a letter for an hour.
questions.correctAnswer: He had been writing a letter for an hour.
questions.explanation: বানানগত ভুল: 'write' এর শেষে silent 'e' বাদ দিয়ে 'ing' যোগ করতে হয় (writing)। 'writeing' ভুল।

questions.question: Find the error: 'They were been making too much noise all day.'
options: They had been making too much noise all day.
They have been making too much noise all day.
They was making too much noise all day.
They making too much noise all day.
questions.correctAnswer: They had been making too much noise all day.
questions.explanation: 'were been making' কোনো সঠিক রূপ নয়। সারা দিন ধরে গোলমাল করার অতীত কাজ বোঝাতে 'had been making' বসবে।

questions.question: Translate: 'মা আসার আগে সে দুই ঘণ্টা ধরে একটি বই পড়ছিল।'
options: She had been reading a book for two hours before her mother came.
She was reading a book for two hours before her mother came.
She reads a book for two hours before her mother came.
She has been reading a book for two hours before her mother came.
questions.correctAnswer: She had been reading a book for two hours before her mother came.
questions.explanation: মা আসার পূর্বের দীর্ঘ চলমান কাজ — Past Perfect Continuous। 'She had been reading... before her mother came (Past Indefinite)' সঠিক।

questions.question: Translate: 'ঝড় শুরু হওয়ার আগে তারা সকাল থেকে ফুটবল খেলছিল।'
options: They had been playing football since morning before the storm began.
They were playing football since morning before the storm began.
They played football since morning before the storm began.
They have been playing football since morning before the storm began.
questions.correctAnswer: They had been playing football since morning before the storm began.
questions.explanation: ঝড় শুরু হওয়ার আগের সকাল থেকে চলা কাজ — Past Perfect Continuous। 'They had been playing... since morning' সঠিক অনুবাদ।

questions.question: Translate: 'আমি ঘুমানোর আগে সকাল থেকে পড়াশোনা করছিলাম।'
options: I had been studying since morning before I slept.
I was studying since morning before I slept.
I studied since morning before I slept.
I have been studying since morning before I slept.
questions.correctAnswer: I had been studying since morning before I slept.
questions.explanation: ঘুমানোর আগের সকাল থেকে চলা কাজ — Past Perfect Continuous। 'I had been studying... before I slept (V2)' সঠিক।

questions.question: Translate: 'আমাদের বাইরে যাওয়ার আগে সারা দিন ধরে বৃষ্টি হচ্ছিল।'
options: It had been raining all day before we went out.
It was raining all day before we went out.
It rained all day before we went out.
It has been raining all day before we went out.
questions.correctAnswer: It had been raining all day before we went out.
questions.explanation: বাইরে যাওয়ার আগের সারা দিনের বৃষ্টি — Past Perfect Continuous। 'It had been raining all day before we went out' সঠিক অনুবাদ।

questions.question: Translate: 'অতিথিরা আসার আগে মা সারা সন্ধ্যা রান্না করছিলেন।'
options: My mother had been cooking all evening before the guests arrived.
My mother was cooking all evening before the guests arrived.
My mother cooked all evening before the guests arrived.
My mother has been cooking all evening before the guests arrived.
questions.correctAnswer: My mother had been cooking all evening before the guests arrived.
questions.explanation: অতিথিদের আসার আগের দীর্ঘ কাজ — Past Perfect Continuous। 'My mother had been cooking' সঠিক অনুবাদ।

questions.question: Translate: 'বিদ্যুৎ যাওয়ার আগে আমরা এক ঘণ্টা ধরে সিনেমা দেখছিলাম।'
options: We had been watching a movie for an hour before the power went out.
We were watching a movie for an hour before the power went out.
We watched a movie for an hour before the power went out.
We have been watching a movie for an hour before the power went out.
questions.correctAnswer: We had been watching a movie for an hour before the power went out.
questions.explanation: বিদ্যুৎ চলে যাওয়ার আগের দীর্ঘ কাজ — Past Perfect Continuous। 'We had been watching' সঠিক অনুবাদ।

questions.question: Translate: 'অসুস্থ হওয়ার আগে সে কয়েক দিন ধরে পরীক্ষার প্রস্তুতি নিচ্ছিল।'
options: She had been preparing for exams for a few days before she fell ill.
She was preparing for exams for a few days before she fell ill.
She prepared for exams for a few days before she fell ill.
She has been preparing for exams for a few days before she fell ill.
questions.correctAnswer: She had been preparing for exams for a few days before she fell ill.
questions.explanation: অসুস্থ হওয়ার আগের কয়েক দিনের দীর্ঘ প্রস্তুতি — Past Perfect Continuous। 'She had been preparing' সঠিক।

questions.question: Translate: 'বিজ্ঞানীরা সতর্ক করার আগে আবহাওয়া অনেক বছর ধরে পরিবর্তিত হচ্ছিল।'
options: The weather had been changing for many years before scientists warned us.
The weather was changing for many years before scientists warned us.
The weather changed for many years before scientists warned us.
The weather has been changing for many years before scientists warned us.
questions.correctAnswer: The weather had been changing for many years before scientists warned us.
questions.explanation: বিজ্ঞানীদের সতর্ক করার পূর্বের দীর্ঘ ধারাবাহিক পরিবর্তন — Past Perfect Continuous। 'The weather had been changing' সঠিক।

questions.question: Translate: 'আমি চাকরিটি পাওয়ার আগে এক বছর ধরে ইংরেজি শিখছিলাম।'
options: I had been learning English for a year before I got the job.
I was learning English for a year before I got the job.
I learned English for a year before I got the job.
I have been learning English for a year before I got the job.
questions.correctAnswer: I had been learning English for a year before I got the job.
questions.explanation: চাকরি পাওয়ার আগের দীর্ঘ এক বছরের ইংরেজি শেখা — Past Perfect Continuous। 'I had been learning' সঠিক অনুবাদ।

questions.question: Choose the correct sentence:
options: She had been reading a book since 2 PM before I came.
She is been reading a book since 2 PM before I came.
She has been reading a book since 2 PM before I came.
She was reading a book since 2 PM before I came.
questions.correctAnswer: She had been reading a book since 2 PM before I came.
questions.explanation: Quick: Past Perfect Continuous = subject + had been + verb-ing + since + time + before + Past Simple।

questions.question: Choose the correct form: 'They ____ football for hours when the bell rang.'
questions.explanation: Quick: ঘণ্টা বাজার আগের দীর্ঘ খেলা — Past Perfect Continuous। 'They' এর সাথে 'had been playing' সঠিক।

questions.question: Pick the correct negative: 'She ____ her homework for an hour when it became dark.'
questions.explanation: Quick: Past Perfect Continuous negative = subject + had not + been + verb-ing। 'She had not been doing' সঠিক।

questions.question: Pick the correct question form: '____ he been writing for an hour before his pen broke?'
questions.explanation: Quick: Past Perfect Continuous question = Had + subject + been + verb-ing? প্রশ্নবোধক করতে শুরুতে 'Had' বসে।

questions.question: Which sentence shows an action continuing up to another past point?
options: I had been living here for ten years before I moved.
I lived here ten years ago.
I am living here for ten years.
I have been living here for ten years.
questions.correctAnswer: I had been living here for ten years before I moved.
questions.explanation: Quick: স্থানান্তরের আগে ১০ বছর বসবাসের দীর্ঘ অতীত ঘটনা বোঝাতে 'had been living' সঠিক।

questions.question: Choose the correct verb: 'The baby ____ since morning before she fell asleep.'
questions.explanation: Quick: ঘুমিয়ে পড়ার আগে সকাল থেকে কাঁদার কাজ — 'had been crying' (Past Perfect Continuous)।

questions.question: Which sentence is grammatically correct (for vs since)?
options: I had been waiting for two hours before she arrived.
I had been waiting since two hours before she arrived.
I was waiting since two hours before she arrived.
I had waiting for two hours before she arrived.
questions.correctAnswer: I had been waiting for two hours before she arrived.
questions.explanation: Quick: সময়ের পরিমাণ (two hours) থাকলে 'for' বসে এবং অতীতের আগের দীর্ঘ কাজ বোঝাতে 'had been waiting' সঠিক।

questions.question: Choose the correct sentence with 'since':
options: He had been working since Monday before he resigned.
He had been working for Monday before he resigned.
He was working since Monday before he resigned.
He has been working since Monday before he resigned.
questions.correctAnswer: He had been working since Monday before he resigned.
questions.explanation: নির্দিষ্ট দিনের আগে 'since' বসে এবং পদত্যাগের আগের দীর্ঘ কাজের ধারাবাহিকতা বোঝাতে 'had been working' সঠিক।

questions.question: Which sentence is grammatically correct?
options: She had been swimming in the pool.
She had been swiming in the pool.
She have been swimming in the pool.
She had been swim in the pool.
questions.correctAnswer: She had been swimming in the pool.
questions.explanation: Quick: 'swim'-এর সঠিক double 'm' যুক্ত ing রূপ হলো 'swimming'। তাই 'She had been swimming' বাক্যটি সঠিক।
